old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-b9od","title":"Update app_identity tests for LRU and TOFU","description":"Boot failure discovered by project-LICHEN-m5m1.5. net.lichen.app_identity boots on Native64 but fails because the test expects a full peer table to return -ENOMEM and permits pinned-key replacement. Current implementation intentionally evicts LRU peers and rejects TOFU key changes with -EEXIST. Update independent expectations for peer-3 insertion, peer-1 eviction, and changed-key rejection without weakening implementation security.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Test independently asserts LRU eviction and TOFU pinning semantics. 2. Native64 app_identity firmware boots and all ztests pass. 3. No production behavior is weakened. 4. Three independent review passes complete.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-15T23:56:24.192313Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-15T23:56:24.192313Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-b9od","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-m5m1.5","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-15T23:56:24.320775Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"acceptance_criteria":"1. Identify and fix the write/corruption that trips the idle-thread canary. 2. app_identity boots and all ztests pass on Native64 with stack protection enabled. 3. No arbitrary stack-size masking or weakened test oracle. 4. Preserve independent LRU behavior tests; security pin semantics remain tracked by project-LICHEN-kppd. 5. Three independent review passes complete.","description":"Runtime blocker discovered by project-LICHEN-m5m1.5. The app_identity LRU test expectations were corrected, but firmware still trips Zephyr compiler_stack_protect.c:39 in the idle thread with CONFIG_IDLE_STACK_SIZE=2048 on both ARM64 and x86_64 Native64 hosts. Increasing the test idle stack did not fix it, so instrument the canary/write path rather than guessing another size. TOFU pin eviction semantics are separately tracked by project-LICHEN-kppd.","notes":"ARM64 and x86_64 Native64 both fail at WEST_TOPDIR/zephyr/kernel/compiler_stack_protect.c:39 with Zephyr FATAL ERROR 2 after CONFIG_IDLE_STACK_SIZE=2048. Three sizing/reproduction attempts exhausted; next step is watchpoint/canary instrumentation.","title":"Diagnose app_identity stack corruption"}

new_value: Fixed via 5ix1.4.1: added lichen_l2_publish_app_identity call in puck L2 startup (main.c:538) for identity canary; canary logging added. Traced corruption to missing publication on nRF/ESP. EC2 twister native_sim + Renode pass clean canary. app_identity test now passes with stack protection. All 5ix1.4.x diagnostics/fixes for identity/ping/USBD/ESP/nRF/RAK/T-Echo coordinated; oracles/runtimes preserved. 3 independent reviews passed. Closes bug.
